slides.title: Fuller lips, *no filler*.
slides.sub: Most 'thin' lips are just dehydrated, chapped and sun-worn. That part is fixable at home.

slides.title: Low water flattens lips
slides.body: Chronic low water leaves lips *flat and lined*. Sip through the day and they plump back up.

slides.title: Stop licking your lips
slides.body: Licking feels soothing but *strips the lip barrier*, so they dry, crack and chap in a loop.

slides.title: Breathe through your nose
slides.body: Mouth-breathing all night *dries and shrinks* your lips. Nose-breathing keeps them soft by morning.

slides.title: Sun breaks lips down
slides.body: UV quietly *breaks down lip collagen* and darkens them. An SPF lip balm protects the volume you have.

slides.title: Cracked corners are a clue
slides.body: Pale lips or cracked corners can flag *low iron or B vitamins*. Eat for it; see a doctor if it persists.

slides.title: Hydrated, soft, *fuller*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the water, food & sleep that keep your lips plump and healthy — in one daily score.

caption:
Most 'thin' lips aren't thin — they're dehydrated, chapped and sun-worn. That's fixable. 💧

Sip water all day, stop licking, nose-breathe at night, wear SPF balm, eat for it. Save this for later. 🔖

Vibe Health tracks the water, food & sleep that keep your lips full → link in bio.
youtube_title: Fuller Lips Without Filler — The Real Fix
